display.name: Eo.S. - pulsecube f demon - mash0000 - yakuza gut cake
display.author: Eo.S.

annotation.technical_notes: A persistent left-aligned triangular custom wave features a high-frequency comb modulation on its trailing edge, driven by treble spikes in the music. Sweeping geometric arcs and hourglass custom shapes are scaled, rotated, and colored via per-frame equations mapped to bass attenuated. A high decay rate in sampler_main maintains high contrast against a dark background, while subtle vertical coordinate stretching in the warp shader creates faint vertical feedback trails.
